scripts.zip_bf_ssm_createSession: cat ./samples/betfair/SSM/createSession/parameters.yml > parameters.yml && cat ./samples/betfair/SSM/createSession/Identity_CreateSession.yml > rts.yml && mkdir -p zips && zip -r zips/betfair-SSM-createSession.zip . -x './samples/*' './zips/*' './results/*' './.idea/*' './.git/*' './packageOld.json' './transactions.yml'
